zh.St. Peters, Titchfield, Hampshire, Engla: 英國英格蘭哈普爾鐵費爾德聖 比特也斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Littlefield於1592年6月2日出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾鐵費爾德聖 比特也斯 邱奇時，他的父親Francis Littlefield27歲，母親Mary Hill22歲。他於1614年10月16日與Annis Austin在英國哈普爾鐵費爾德結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1653年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼越可爾且於1661年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼威爾斯。他在美國緬因州約克肯布普特被列為owned mills。他去世於1661年12月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩約克享年69歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩約克。

zh-hans.St. Peters, Titchfield, Hampshire, Engla: 英国英格兰哈普爾鐵費爾德聖 比特也斯 邱奇
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Littlefield于1592年6月2日出生在英国英格兰哈普爾鐵費爾德聖 比特也斯 邱奇时，他的父亲Francis Littlefield27岁，母亲Mary Hill22岁。他于1614年10月16日与Annis Austin在英国哈普爾鐵費爾德结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1653年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼越可爾且于1661年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼威爾斯。他在美国缅因州約克肯布普特被列为owned mills。他去世于1661年12月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩約克享年69岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普洛文斯 本 曼恩約克。

nameMeanings.name: Littlefield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Littlefield Green in White Waltham, Berkshire. The placename derives from Old English lȳtel ‘little’ + feld ‘open country’.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Historical Boundaries: 1716: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: York, Massachusetts, United States 1820: York, Maine, United States

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

Historical Boundaries: 1642:  Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1653: Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1664: Maine, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1668: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1680: Massachusetts Claim, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1691: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: York, Massachusetts, United States 1820: York, Maine, United States

Long before Wells incorporation in 1653, as the third town in Maine, temporary residences were built on the beaches by traders and fishermen. Edmund Littlefield, the father of Wells, established a permanent home, sawmill and gristmill as early as 1640-41 at the falls of the Webhannet River. Reverend John Wheelwright soon followed and by 1642 was attempting to provide religious freedom here for himself and his followers. He established the first church and claimed several tracts of land for himself. During his brief three or four year stay, he also served as one of the agents appointed to survey and allot lands of Gorges grant to Wellssettlers.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Littlefield was born on 2 June 1592, in St Peter's Church, Titchfield, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Francis Littlefield, was 27 and his mother, Mary Hill, was 22. He married Annis Austin on 16 October 1614, in Titchfield, Hampshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He lived in Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1653 and Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1661. His occupation is listed as owned mills in Kennebunkport, York, Maine, United States. He died on 11 December 1661, in York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America, at the age of 69, and was buried in York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America.

fr.St. Peters, Titchfield, Hampshire, Engla: St Peter's Church, Titchfield, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Littlefield est né le 2 juin 1592, à St Peter's Church, Titchfield, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Francis Littlefield, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mary Hill, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Annis Austin le 16 octobre 1614, à Titchfield, Hampshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il a vécu à Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1653 et à Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1661. Sa profession de son indiquée est owned mills à Kennebunkport, York, Maine, États-Unis. Il est décédé le 11 décembre 1661, à York, Province of Maine, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à York, Province of Maine, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.St. Peters, Titchfield, Hampshire, Engla: St Peter's Church, Titchfield, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Littlefield am 2. Juni 1592 in St Peter's Church, Titchfield, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Francis Littlefield 27 und seine Mutter Mary Hill 22. Er hat am 16. Oktober 1614 in Titchfield, Hampshire, England Annis Austin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1653 hat er in Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und 1661 in Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. sein Beruf ist als owned mills in Kennebunkport, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten aufgeführt. Er starb am 11. Dezember 1661 im Alter von 69 Jahren in York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America und wurde in York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Littlefield è nato il il 2 giugno 1592 nel St Peter's Church, Titchfield, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Francis Littlefield, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Mary Hill, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Annis Austin il 16 ottobre 1614, nel Titchfield, Hampshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Vissuto a Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1653 e nel Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1661. La sua occupazione è indicata come owned mills nel Kennebunkport, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America. Morì il 11 dicembre 1661, nel York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America.

ja.St. Peters, Titchfield, Hampshire, Engla: イギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアティトチフィールドスト ペテル'ス チャーチ
ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Littlefieldが1592年6月2日にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアティトチフィールドスト ペテル'ス チャーチで生まれた時，父Francis Littlefieldは27歳，母Mary Hillは22歳であった。1614年10月16日にイギリスハンプシュアイアティトチフィールドでAnnis Austinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1653年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークシュアイアに，1661年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーウエルズに住んでいた。アメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークケネブンクプオルトでの職業はowned millsと記録されている。彼は1661年12月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカプロヴィンス オフ メインヨークで69歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカプロヴィンス オフ メインヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.St Peter's Church, Titchfield, Hampshire: 영국 함프실르 티트ch필드 스트 피터'스 c후르치

ko.St. Peters, Titchfield, Hampshire, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 티트ch필드 스트 피터'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Littlefield(이)가 1592년 6월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 티트ch필드 스트 피터'스 c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Francis Littlefield(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Hill(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1614년 10월 16일 영국 함프실르 티트ch필드에서 Annis Austin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1653년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크실르에서, 1661년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 웰스에서 살았다. 그의 직업은 미국 메인 주 요르크 켄버k포트에서 owned mills이었다. 그는 1661년 12월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 프로빈스 프 맹 요르크에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 프로빈스 프 맹 요르크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Littlefield nasceu em 2 de junho de 1592, em St Peter's Church, Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Francis Littlefield, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mary Hill, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Annis Austin em 16 de outubro de 1614, em Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele viveu em Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1653 e em Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1661. Sua profissão aparece como owned mills em Kennebunkport, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América. Ele faleceu em 11 de dezembro de 1661, em York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America.

ru.St. Peters, Titchfield, Hampshire, Engla: ст питир'с чурч, тичфиелд, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Littlefield родился 2 июня 1592 г. в местности ст питир'с чурч, тичфиелд, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Francis Littlefield было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Hill, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Annis Austin 16 октября 1614 г. в местности тичфиелд, хампшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он жил в местности еркшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1653 году и в местности веллс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1661 году.  Он работал по профессии owned mills в местности кеннебункпорт, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты. Он умер 11 декабря 1661 г. в местности ерк, провинц оф меин, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности ерк, провинц оф меин, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Littlefield nació el 2 de junio de 1592, en St Peter's Church, Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Francis Littlefield, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mary Hill, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Annis Austin el 16 de octubre de 1614, en Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Vivió en Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1653 y en Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1661. Su ocupación registrada era owned mills en Kennebunkport, York, Maine, Estados Unidos. Murió el 11 de diciembre de 1661, en York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en York, Province of Maine, British Colonial America.
